◎简　　介  

　　When a tragedy shatters her plans for domestic bliss, a seemingly typical Southern newlywed gradually transforms into a spiritual seeker, quietly threatening the closest relationships around her.One of ten projects selected in 2013 for IFP’s Narrative Lab, the debut feature from filmmakers Paul Harrill and Ashley Maynor is both a meditative character study and an unconventiona...
